parsed.production_notes: The video features a split-screen with a 3D animated AI avatar on top and a human-recorded video on the bottom. The human video appears to be a standard webcam or phone recording, while the top half is clearly computer-generated animation.

characters.appearance: 3D animated female character. Young adult appearance, fair complexion, large green eyes, and reddish-brown hair styled in a high bun. She wears small gold hoop earrings.
characters.wardrobe: A simple, light-colored (possibly white or cream) top.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and expressive, typical of an animated character.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, fair complexion, long straight blonde hair with dark roots. She has dark eyeliner and defined eyebrows.
characters.wardrobe: A plain grey long-sleeved shirt or sweatshirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially hesitant and focused on her hands, becoming more engaged and surprised as the conversation progresses.

scenes.setting: Split screen. Top: A cozy, softly lit room with string lights and a lamp. Bottom: A room with purple LED lighting.
scenes.camera: Split-screen, both panels are medium close-ups.

panels.panel_visual_description: A 3D animated young woman with reddish-brown hair in a high bun and green eyes is framed in a medium close-up. She is smiling and looking directly forward. The background is a softly lit room with warm, out-of-focus string lights and a small lamp, creating a cozy atmosphere.

A young woman with long blonde hair is framed in a medium close-up. She is holding and manipulating a bright orange, squishy object in her hands. The background is illuminated with vibrant purple LED lights, and a gaming chair is partially visible behind her.

scenes.visual_description: A split-screen layout with an animated character on top and a real person on the bottom. The animated character appears to be speaking to the real person, who is holding an orange object. Subtitles appear in the middle of the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ¿Hablas español? [Do you speak Spanish?]
Character B says: Sí, conozco español. [Yes, I know Spanish.]
Character A says: Técnicamente es correcto, pero los hablantes nativos simplemente dicen, hablo español. [Technically it's correct, but native speakers simply say, I speak Spanish.]
Character B says: Hablo español. [I speak Spanish.]
Character A says: ¿Cuántos años tienes? [How old are you?]
Character B says: Yo soy veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years.]
Character A says: Quieres decir, tengo veinticuatro años. [You mean, I have twenty-four years.]
Character B says: Tengo veinticuatro años. [I am twenty-four years old.]
Character A says: ¿Cómo te llamas? [What is your name?]
Character B says: Mi nombre es Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character A says: Los hablantes nativos normalmente dicen, me llamo Nesly. [Native speakers normally say, I call myself Nesly.]
Character B says: Me llamo Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character A says: Bien hecho. [Well done.]
Character B says: Gracias, ¿pero quién eres tú? [Thank you, but who are you?]
Character A says: Soy un tutor de IA en Praktika. Podemos hablar así todos los días para aprender español. [I am an AI tutor on Praktika. We can talk like this every day to learn Spanish.]
Character B says: Ah, pero mi español es A1. No puedo hablar. [Ah, but my Spanish is A1. I can't speak.]
Character A says: No te preocupes. Puedo enseñarte en tu lengua materna mientras aprendes español. [Don't worry. I can teach you in your mother tongue while you learn Spanish.]
Character B says: ¿Conoces mi idioma? [Do you know my language?]
Character A says: Claro, soy una IA. [Of course, I am an AI.]
Character B says: Está bien, voy a descargar esta aplicación. [Okay, I'm going to download this app.]
